expected_facts: Caroline feels supported by people around her who accept and support her.
Caroline has been trying out abstract art recently.
Caroline is thrilled to make a family for kids who need one.
Caroline hopes to build her own family and provide a home for children who haven't had one before.
Caroline offers to help Melanie if she decides to adopt.
Melanie started playing the clarinet when she was young.
Melanie's kids loved the pottery workshop.
Melanie has a dog named Oliver and a cat named Bailey.
Melanie's family is super important to her.
